/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/sensor.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/battery.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/emergency.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/fake_mcu.c.o "CMakeFiles/app.dir/FreeRTOS-Kernel/portable/MemMang/heap_4.c.o" -o app  FreeRTOS-Kernel/libfreertos_kernel.a
